reviews.review_msg: I never went to class js read the textbook and did the nailed down the wiley questions, they were really good help for the midterm and final. midterm was light, the final was a bit more tough. Overall wiley helped more than the canvas quizzes. There isn't tutorial attendance either.

good prof for a hard class he gave us a cheat sheet for final, it was nice he adjusted our grades if we improved on final and performed better than midterms. He's not trying to fail you so work hard. use Wiley! many questions were from his weekly homework, do practice questions per chapter and format of exams is same as the practice ones he gives
i could not understand him for the whole year sadly. nice guy tho. course is pretty difficult anyways
While he is chill, he does not teach very well and you are left to fend for yourself on all the assignments. Without the TA's this class would be in shambles
hes funny and a good enough prof. gave pizza party to distract u from the fact that his final is worth 50%.... n sometimes he lwk sounds like he speaking chinese but other than that hes chill
He is a great prof! Sometimes he can go off topic but otherwise really good as he is approachable and willing to answer questions.
funny and gives good examples that back up the material. is giving us a pizza party on the last day. shoutout ray zhang

A bit disorganized, but he is very effective at synthesizing the textbook information and providing lots of relevant examples during lectures. if you take him, go to class! he's a pretty chill dude too.
